title: Sounder Flats
content:
{{Top|leg}}
[[File:Sounder_Flats.jpg|thumb|right|250px|The [[Sounder Flats computer complex]]]]

'''Sounder Flats''' was the site of a [[Sounder Flats computer complex|computer complex]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of [[Ruul (planet)|Ruul]]. Craggy hills and deep canyons characterized this area of Ruul, making navigation to the flats extremely difficult. The area was also home to a pair of heavily defended [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] bases. Both the bases and the [[Computer/Legends|computer]] complex fell victim to an [[Mission to Ruul (Galactic Civil War)|information raid]] by [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] [[General/Legends|general]] [[Brenn Tantor]] before the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Force Commander]]''
